---
title: RosyREDCap Report
subtitle: \href{http://www.thecodingdocs.com}{\includegraphics[width=3cm]{`r system.file("rmarkdown", "TCDblack.png", package = "RosyREDCap")`}} \href{https://github.com/thecodingdocs/RosyREDCap}{\includegraphics[width=2.1cm]{`r system.file("rmarkdown", "logo.png", package = "RosyREDCap")`}}
author: Brandon Rose, MD, MPH
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
geometry: margin=0.5in
abstract: This report was generated from the RosyREDCap package using R markdown. 
header-includes: 
  \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  \pagestyle{fancy}
  \setlength\headheight{1in}
  \fancyhead[L]{\textbf{RosyREDCap Report}\\\textbf{Generated `r Sys.Date()`}\\\textbf{Page \thepage}}
  \fancyhead[C]{\href{https://www.thecodingdocs.com}{TheCodingDocs.com}\\\href{https://github.com/thecodingdocs/RosyREDCap}{github.com/thecodingdocs/RosyREDCap}}
  \fancyhead[R]{\href{http://www.thecodingdocs.com}{\includegraphics[width=2cm]{`r system.file("rmarkdown", "TCDblack.png", package = "RosyREDCap")`}} \href{https://github.com/thecodingdocs/RosyREDCap}{\includegraphics[width=1.5cm]{`r system.file("rmarkdown", "logo.png", package = "RosyREDCap")`}}}
output: 
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
urlcolor: blue
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

\newpage

# Project Summary

## Summary Information

> **Project Title:** `r project$redcap$project_info$project_title`\
> **Project ID:** `r project$redcap$project_id`\
> **REDCap Created:** `r as.Date(project$redcap$project_info$creation_time)`\
> **Data Last Updated:** `r project$internals$last_data_update`

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
if(is_something(project$redcap$project_info$project_notes)){
  cat(">**Notes:** ",project$redcap$project_info$project_notes,"  ")
}
```
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
if(is_something(project$redcap$project_info$project_pi_lastname)){
  cat(">**Principal Investigator:** ",paste(project$redcap$project_info$project_pi_firstname,project$redcap$project_info$project_pi_lastname),"  ")
}
```
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
if(is_something(project$redcap$project_info$project_irb_number)){
  cat(">**IRB Number:** ",project$redcap$project_info$project_irb_number,"  ")
}
```
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
if(is_something(project$redcap$project_info$missing_data_codes)){
  cat(">**Missing Codes:** ")
  project$redcap$project_info$missing_data_codes |>REDCapSync:::split_choices() |> knitr::kable()
}
```
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
if(is_something(project$arms,1)){
  cat(">**Arms:** ",nrow(project$arms),"  ")
  # project$arms |> knitr::kable()
}
```
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
if(is_something(project$metadata$events)){
  cat(">**Events:** ",nrow(project$metadata$events),"  ")
  # project$metadata$events |> knitr::kable()
}
```
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
if(is_something(project$all_records)){
  cat(">**Records:** ",nrow(project$all_records),"  ")
  # project$metadata$events |> knitr::kable()
}
```
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
if(is_something(project$metadata$forms)){
  x<-nrow(project$metadata$forms)
  if(project$metadata$has_repeating_forms){
    x <- x |> paste0(" (",project$metadata$forms$repeating |> which() |> length()," repeating)")
  }
  ">**Instruments:** " |> paste0(x,"  ") |> cat()
}
```
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
if(is_something(project$metadata$fields)){
  v <- project$metadata$fields$field_type |> sort() |> rle()
  d <- data.frame(
    values = v$values,
    lengths = v$lengths
  )
  d <- d[order(d$lengths,decreasing = T),]
  d <- d[order(d$values),]
  vars <- ( project$metadata$fields$field_type!="checkbox_choice") |> which() |> length()
  
  if("checkbox_choice"%in%d$values){
    vars <- vars |>paste0(" (",(project$metadata$fields$field_type!="checkbox") |> which() |> length()," if you count checkboxes individually)")
  }
  ">**Variabes:** " |> paste0(vars,"  ") |> cat()
  # cat("\n\n")
  # for(i in 1:nrow(d)){
  #   head  <- "> "
  #   if(d$values[i]=="checkbox_choice"){
  #     head <- "> - "
  #   }
  #   cat(paste0(head,"**",d$values[i],":** ",d$lengths[i]))
  #   cat("\n\n")
  #   
  # }
}
```

## Data

>**Records:** [`r prettyNum(number_records, big.mark = ",")`](`number_records`)  
>**Last Data Change:** [`r last_data`](`last_data`)  
>**Last Metadata Change:** [`r last_metadata`](`last_metadata`)  


## REDCap Links

>**REDCap Home:** [`r project$links$redcap_base`](`r   project$links$redcap_base`)  
>**REDCap Project:** [`r project$links$redcap_home`](`r project$links$redcap_home`)  
>**REDCap Project API Token:** [`r project$links$redcap_api`](`r project$links$redcap_api`)  
>**REDCap Project API Playground:** [`r project$links$redcap_api_playground`](`r project$links$redcap_api_playground`)  

\newpage

# Structure Diagram

![](redcap_diagram.png)

\newpage

# About RosyREDCap and REDCapSync

R and REDCap are both widely used in clinical research, but integrating them efficiently remains a challenge.

REDCapSync is a project-agnostic R package that retrieves and maintains complete REDCap datasets using an API-efficient, log-based approach—only updating what has changed. Each project is standardized into an R6 object for downstream analysis.

RosyREDCap is a companion Shiny application that enables users to explore, deidentify, and visualize REDCap data without writing code. The R package also exports functions where the REDCapSync objects are used at inputs.

Together, these tools allow clinical teams to build reproducible data pipelines and easily distribute clean datasets—without needing deep knowledge of the REDCap API.

## Links

-   The REDCapSync package is at [github.com/thecodingdocs/REDCapSync](https://github.com/thecodingdocs/REDCapSync "REDCapSync R package"). See instructions above.
-   The RosyREDCap package is at [github.com/thecodingdocs/RosyREDCap](https://github.com/thecodingdocs/RosyREDCap "RosyREDCap R package").
-   For more R coding visit [TheCodingDocs.com](https://www.thecodingdocs.com/ "TheCodingDocs.com")
-   For correspondence/feedback/issues, please email [TheCodingDocs\@gmail.com](mailto:TheCodingDocs@gmail.com)!
-   Follow us on Twitter/X [x.com/TheCodingDocs](https://x.com/TheCodingDocs/ "TheCodingDocs Twitter")
-   Follow me on Twitter/X [x.com/BRoseMDMPH](https://x.com/BRoseMDMPH/ "BRoseMDMPH Twitter")

[![TheCodingDocs.com](`r system.file("rmarkdown", "TCD.png", package = "RosyREDCap")`){ width=210px }](http://www.thecodingdocs.com) [![TheCodingDocs.com](`r system.file("rmarkdown", "REDCapSync.png", package = "RosyREDCap")`){ width=150px }](https://github.com/thecodingdocs/REDCapSync)[![TheCodingDocs.com](`r system.file("rmarkdown", "logo.png", package = "RosyREDCap")`){ width=150px }](https://github.com/thecodingdocs/RosyREDCap)
